text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What an intricate game of deception... I know
how it all played out historically, but my palms
are sweating all the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hold on. How is it so late already?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And yet... I can hardly turn in now, without having
seen the dramatic conclusion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Ardan ends up staying awake until
the early hours...
